flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Panola College fell 15% between 2006 and 2009 (29.9% → 25.4%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Panola College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (68.2% → 58.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Panola College rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.4k → $10.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Panola College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.7k → $5.2k).
